title: Size plugin
description: Size plugin that allows people to change size by one command. Only (ru) language available yet.
body:
### SizeChanger – Change Your Player Size with a Command
SizeChanger is a lightweight plugin that lets players change their in-game size using /size <value>. Become tiny with /size 0.6, go giant with /size 2, or reset with /size 1. Great for minigames, roleplay, parkour challenges, or just having fun.
- You can change the size limits in config
- Easy to install, no config needed
- Works in survival and creative
- Compatible with Paper, Purpur, and Spigot (1.21.5)
- Optional permission: sizechanger.use
- Perfect for servers looking to add a simple and fun gameplay mechanic!
